name: Chicken Pinwheel
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the seasonings and set aside.
2. Flatten each chicken breast to 1/4 inch thick.
3. Sprinkle with the combined seasonings.
4. Place a slice of ham on each chicken breast.
5. Roll up from the long end, rolling tightly.
6. Place seam side down in a baking dish.
7. Drizzle with lemon juice and sprinkle with paprika.
8. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 20-25 minutes.
9. Chill well and refrigerate.
10. Slice each roll into 1/4 inch slices.
11. Place on lettuce leaves and garnish with cherry tomatoes.
